content:
Hey MJ 🪐 — evening check-in

**Today's Habits:**
• Lift? 💪 (Goal: 4x/week)
• Run? 🏃 (Goal: 5x/week)

If yes — log it in Trello Habits & Routines.
If no — no guilt, just awareness. Tomorrow's a new day.

**Trading Discipline Check:**
• Did you follow your plan today?
• What emotion showed up most?
• One thing to improve tomorrow?

Remember: 'The market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient.' — Buffett

Task approval at 10 PM if you want overnight work.

— Juno, your accountability partner
